journey.name: 00-seed
journey.description: 建立基线虚构测试数据供后续 journey 复用。第一步必须处理首启隐私协议 gate。 末尾逐项校验数据建成，任一缺失则本 journey FAILED、后续全 SKIP。 所有数据均为虚构，禁止填入任何真实账户/WebDAV 凭据。

actions.action: If a privacy-protocol agreement dialog is shown on first launch, tap its agree/confirm button (testTag launcher_protocol_confirm, text "确定")
Verify the home screen is shown (an element with testTag launcher_title is present)
Open the navigation drawer by tapping the menu icon at the top-left of the home screen
Navigate to the books (账本) management screen
Create a new book named "测试账本A"
Verify a book named "测试账本A" appears in the books list
Navigate back to the home screen
Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the assets (资产) management screen
Create a new cash (现金) asset named "测试现金" with an initial balance of 1000
Create a new savings-card (储蓄卡) asset named "测试储蓄卡" with an initial balance of 5000
Create a new credit-card (信用卡) asset named "测试信用卡"
Verify all three assets "测试现金", "测试储蓄卡", "测试信用卡" appear in the assets list
Navigate back to the home screen
Tap the add-record floating action button on the home screen
Create an EXPENDITURE record: amount 100, select a category, select asset "测试现金", then save
Verify the record list on the home screen shows a 100 expenditure
Tap the add-record floating action button
Create an INCOME record: amount 200, select an income category, select asset "测试储蓄卡", then save
Verify the record list shows a 200 income
Tap the add-record floating action button
Create a TRANSFER record from "测试储蓄卡" to "测试现金" with amount 300, then save
Verify a transfer record appears in the record list
Tap the add-record floating action button
Create an EXPENDITURE record amount 500 to be reimbursed later (select a category and asset, save). Note its description for later reimbursement.
Tap the add-record floating action button
Create an INCOME record of type 报销款 (reimbursement) amount 500, and in its related-record selection relate it to the 500 expenditure created above, then save
Verify the 500 expenditure now shows as reimbursed (struck-through original amount with a reimbursed tag) in the record list

Verify seed completeness: the books list contains "测试账本A"; the assets list contains "测试现金"/"测试储蓄卡"/"测试信用卡"; the record list contains at least one expenditure, one income, one transfer, and one reimbursed record
